response.step_by_step_log: The video shows two characters, Shirogane Noel and Tsunomaki Watame, performing. On-screen text identified the song as "ユメクイ" (Yumekui) and credits the composer as "愛" (Ai, likely referring to Ai Otsuka, the original artist). I searched for "ユメクイ 愛 Japanese and English lyrics". Multiple sources confirmed Ai Otsuka is the original artist of "ユメクイ". I extracted the main lyrics shown on screen for the reference.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual live performance by two characters, Shirogane Noel and Tsunomaki Watame (Hololive production), singing the song "Yumekui". The performance is a duet choreographed with visual effects.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel and Tsunomaki Watame perform the song 'Yumekui' on a virtual stage. The song title and credits appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
僕は今 夢旅の中
あの星の島までも 飛んでゆける
手のりウタうたう僕のユメクイ
君のそばにも辿り着ける
君の傍でずっと夢を見る
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Right now, I am inside a dream journey
Even to the island of that star, I can fly
My dream eater that sings with a hand-size song
I can arrive at your side too
And dream forever by your side
